{"type":"flowgraph","mermaid":"graph TD subgraph UV["ultravisor (host process)"] Bridges["QueuePersistenceBridge
ManifestStoreBridge
→ dispatch(MeadowProxy.Request, {Method, Path, Body})"] HWM["persistence-bridge-hwm.json
Queue: {<beaconID>: HWM}
Manifest: {<beaconID>: HWM}"] end subgraph DB["retold-databeacon (assigned for persistence)"] Proxy["MeadowProxy.Request → HTTP to /1.0/<UVTable>/...
DataBeaconManagement.Introspect / EnableEndpoint
DataBeaconSchema.EnsureSchema ← NEW"] end UserDB["<user-chosen database>"] UV -->|beacon protocol| DB DB -->|meadow connector (mysql/mssql/postgres/sqlite/...)| UserDB ","style":"notebook"}
